prompt: Write a 5-year financial model for openpatent.ai projecting from a $15M Series A close at $50M pre. Cover: (1) the 5 revenue streams — defensive tier $149 × projected 4,200/12,000/28,000/55,000/95,000 paying customers, full tier $999 × 320/950/2,400/4,800/8,200, premium $2,499 × 45/180/520/1,200/2,400, enterprise $4,999 × 8/32/85/180/340, OTS self-serve $10 × 18k/72k/220k/580k/1.2M transactions, (2) the COGS line — Bitcoin OTS fees $0.18/anchored disclosure (rises to $0.40 by yr5), KMS $0.004/tx, BFT council compute $0.12/review, sovereign VM opex $7.2k/mo × 3 regions scaling to 5, (3) the gross margin — yr1 78%, yr3 88%, yr5 92%, (4) the opex — engineering 14→38 FTE, sales 4→22, G&A 3→9, (5) the bottom line — yr1 -$2.8M, yr2 -$1.4M, yr3 +$3.2M, yr4 +$14.8M, yr5 +$38.4M ARR-equivalent, (6) the key assumption — the BFT council review attached at the $999 tier drives 62% of full-tier conversion. Use DEFENEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {revenue_streams:[5 strings], cogs_lines:[4 strings], gross_margin_pct:[5 numbers], opex_lines:[3 strings], bottom_line_usd:[5 numbers], key_assumption:string}.
